languages.text: "Сейчас не время думать об этом, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Безусловно, я желал бы вновь обрести корабль и отправиться к холодным звездам, еще не покоренным Человечеством. Но вряд ли этому суждено сбыться". {n}Предок коротко и горько усмехается.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Сейчас не время думать об этом, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Безусловно, я желал бы вновь обрести корабль и отправиться к холодным звездам, еще не покоренным Человечеством. Но вряд ли этому суждено сбыться". {n}Предок коротко и горько усмехается.{/n}

languages.text: "Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Сейчас не время думать об этом, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Безусловно, я желал бы вновь обрести корабль и отправиться к холодным звездам, еще не покоренным Человечеством. Но вряд ли этому суждено сбыться". {n}Предок коротко и горько усмехается.{/n}

"Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}

languages.text: 「今はそんなことを考える時ではない、私の後継者。私は再び空飛ぶ船を操り、人類の名のもとにまだ未踏の冷たい星々へと向かうことを強く望んでいる。しかし、それは叶うことはなさそうだ。」{n}彼は短く苦々しい笑いを漏らした。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「今はそんなことを考える時ではない、私の後継者。私は再び空飛ぶ船を操り、人類の名のもとにまだ未踏の冷たい星々へと向かうことを強く望んでいる。しかし、それは叶うことはなさそうだ。」{n}彼は短く苦々しい笑いを漏らした。{/n}

languages.text: “现在不是考虑这些的时候，我的继承人。不可否认，我渴望再次指挥一艘虚空舰，以人类之名驶向那些尚未被占领的冰冷群星。可惜，这已不太可能实现了。”{n}他短促而苦涩地轻笑了一声。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “现在不是考虑这些的时候，我的继承人。不可否认，我渴望再次指挥一艘虚空舰，以人类之名驶向那些尚未被占领的冰冷群星。可惜，这已不太可能实现了。”{n}他短促而苦涩地轻笑了一声。{/n}

languages.text: "Şimdi bunları düşünmenin zamanı değil vârisim. Bir uçsuz gemisine bir kez daha komuta etmeyi ve onu İnsanlık adına henüz fethedilmemiş soğuk yıldızlara götürmeyi ne kadar arzuladığımı inkâr edemem. Ne yazık ki bunun gerçekleşmesi pek olası değil." {n}Kısa ve acı bir şekilde kıkırdıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi bunları düşünmenin zamanı değil vârisim. Bir uçsuz gemisine bir kez daha komuta etmeyi ve onu İnsanlık adına henüz fethedilmemiş soğuk yıldızlara götürmeyi ne kadar arzuladığımı inkâr edemem. Ne yazık ki bunun gerçekleşmesi pek olası değil." {n}Kısa ve acı bir şekilde kıkırdıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «No es momento de pensar en esas cosas, hereder{mf|o|a}. No niego que anhelo poder dirigir una nave del vacío hacia las estrellas frías que aún no pertenecen a la Humanidad, pero es poco probable que suceda». {n}Suelta una risa breve y amarga.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No es momento de pensar en esas cosas, hereder{mf|o|a}. No niego que anhelo poder dirigir una nave del vacío hacia las estrellas frías que aún no pertenecen a la Humanidad, pero es poco probable que suceda». {n}Suelta una risa breve y amarga.{/n}

languages.text: « Ce n'est pas le moment de songer à de telles choses. Je ne nierais pas que j'aimerais prendre la tête d'un nouveau vaisseau et faire cap sur les étoiles que nous pouvons encore conquérir au nom de l'humanité. Hélas, je doute que cela arrive. » {n}Il laisse échapper un petit rire amer.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est pas le moment de songer à de telles choses. Je ne nierais pas que j'aimerais prendre la tête d'un nouveau vaisseau et faire cap sur les étoiles que nous pouvons encore conquérir au nom de l'humanité. Hélas, je doute que cela arrive. » {n}Il laisse échapper un petit rire amer.{/n}

languages.text: "Für solche Gedanken ist jetzt keine Zeit, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Ich will nicht abstreiten, dass ich noch einmal ein Raumschiff befehligen und zu den kalten Sternen fliegen möchte, um sie im Namen der Menschheit zu annektieren. Leider wird das wohl nicht passieren." {n}Er lacht verbittert auf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Für solche Gedanken ist jetzt keine Zeit, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Ich will nicht abstreiten, dass ich noch einmal ein Raumschiff befehligen und zu den kalten Sternen fliegen möchte, um sie im Namen der Menschheit zu annektieren. Leider wird das wohl nicht passieren." {n}Er lacht verbittert auf.{/n}
